hooks.command: if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git stash push -m "auto-stash-before-claude-session-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)" 2>&1 && echo '{"systemMessage":"Auto-stashed uncommitted changes. Use git stash pop to restore."}'; else echo '{"systemMessage":"No uncommitted changes to stash."}'; fi

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE 'git (checkout|clean|reset --hard|push --force|push -f|branch -D)' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: Destructive git command. Run manually if needed."}' && exit 2 || true
